crime.value: Serial killing - a killer dressed as a priest murders women who resemble his mother, with four victims mentioned
crime.quote: It would be the fourth victim in the cleansing. Today would be the climax of his psychotic thoughts.

victim.value: Mrs. Templer, a married woman without children targeted because she resembles the killer's 'whoring mother'
victim.quote: she was married without children. She resembled his whoring mother who had shamed and emasculated him.

closed_world.value: Lake Powell in Arizona where the killer works as a patrol boat officer for the Corps of Engineers
closed_world.quote: He googled Lake Powell and it had to be the lake in Arizona.

culprit_and_motive.value: A Lake Powell patrol officer killing women who remind him of his mother to 'cleanse' the world of such 'vermin'
culprit_and_motive.quote: The world would be rid of such vermin. It would be the fourth victim in the cleansing.

investigator.value: Larry, a police officer with psychic visions who uses his visions to track and stop killers during vacation time
investigator.quote: Larry only used his vacation time to hunt his deadly prey.

red_herring.value: Priest disguise used by killer to gain entry, creating false religious association
red_herring.quote: He was dressed as a priest because the mission was blessed. He rang the door bell.

clue_fairness.value: Larry's psychic visions provide clues about killer's location and methods available to reader
clue_fairness.quote: The vision revealed a large lake. The killer was in a patrol boat of some kind with the name Lake Powell Patrol

social_world.value: Police department hierarchy and professional courtesy between law enforcement officers
social_world.quote: The officer's attitude changed when the gold badge catching the Sun's rays flashed in his eyes.

alibi.value: Killer uses employment as Lake Powell patrolman as cover for stalking victims on the lake
alibi.quote: he was an employee of the Corp, of Engineers for Lake Powell as a patrolman

investigator_wound.value: Jack's Navy injuries and disability pension, Larry's debilitating psychic visions causing migraines
investigator_wound.quote: After his injuries while on a secret mission for the Navy he quit and took his disability pension
